requirement_topic.zh: R600a可燃性——碳氢制冷剂安全
requirement_topic.zht: R600a可燃性——碳氫製冷劑安全

summary.en: The mandatory obligation is Australian electrical safety compliance and, where applicable, EESS/RCM compliance before sale. R600a (isobutane) is a flammable hydrocarbon refrigerant, so the refrigerator safety file should address flammable refrigerant charge limits, enclosure and ventilation assumptions, ignition-source controls, markings, user instructions, servicing warnings, and transport/packaging declarations. AS/NZS 60335.2.24 is the relevant refrigerator safety standard route for flammable refrigerant construction and marking requirements, read with AS/NZS 60335.1 and EESS evidence requirements.
summary.zh: 强制性义务是在销售前符合澳大利亚电气安全要求，并在适用时符合EESS/RCM要求。R600a（异丁烷）为可燃碳氢制冷剂，因此电冰箱安全文件应覆盖可燃制冷剂充注量限制、外壳和通风假设、点火源控制、标识、用户说明、维修警告及运输/包装声明。AS/NZS 60335.2.24是可燃制冷剂结构和标识要求的相关电冰箱安全标准路径，并须与AS/NZS 60335.1及EESS证据要求结合使用。
summary.zht: 強制性義務是在銷售前符合澳洲電氣安全要求，並在適用時符合EESS/RCM要求。R600a（異丁烷）為可燃碳氫製冷劑，因此電冰箱安全文件應覆蓋可燃製冷劑充注量限制、外殼和通風假設、點火源控制、標識、用戶說明、維修警告及運輸/包裝聲明。AS/NZS 60335.2.24是可燃製冷劑結構和標識要求的相關電冰箱安全標準路徑，並須與AS/NZS 60335.1及EESS證據要求結合使用。

standards_or_laws: EESS participating jurisdiction electrical safety laws and Equipment Safety Rules — mandatory safety framework where applicable
AS/NZS 60335.2.24 — refrigerator safety standard route including flammable refrigerant requirements
AS/NZS 4417.1 and AS/NZS 4417.2 — RCM marking and classification framework

summary.en: Chinese refrigerator factories commonly use R600a and test to GB 4706.13/GB 4706.1 under CCC. The Chinese file may include flammable refrigerant markings and charge data, but it is built for the Chinese CCC/GB route and may not contain all evidence expected by Australian electrical safety regulators or EESS certifiers.
summary.zh: 中国电冰箱工厂普遍使用R600a，并按GB 4706.13/GB 4706.1进行CCC测试。中国文件可能包含可燃制冷剂标识和充注量数据，但其服务于中国CCC/GB路径，未必包含澳大利亚电气安全监管机构或EESS发证机构期望的全部证据。
summary.zht: 中國電冰箱工廠普遍使用R600a，並按GB 4706.13/GB 4706.1進行CCC測試。中國文件可能包含可燃製冷劑標識和充注量數據，但其服務於中國CCC/GB路徑，未必包含澳洲電氣安全監管機構或EESS發證機構期望的全部證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.1-2005 — China general appliance safety standard
CCC certification file and product nameplate/marking records

gap.en: The main gap is not whether R600a is allowed, but whether the Australian safety evidence is complete. Exporters should reconcile charge mass, refrigerant symbol, warning labels, compressor and component ignition-source assessment, user/service instructions, and test report clauses to AS/NZS 60335.2.24. Any change in refrigerant charge, cabinet volume, compressor, control board, fan, lamp, or defrost heater can affect the flammability assessment.
gap.zh: 主要差距并非R600a是否允许使用，而是澳大利亚安全证据是否完整。出口商应将充注量、制冷剂符号、警示标签、压缩机和部件点火源评估、用户/维修说明及测试报告条款与AS/NZS 60335.2.24逐项对应。制冷剂充注量、箱体容积、压缩机、控制板、风扇、照明或化霜加热器的任何变化都可能影响可燃性评估。
gap.zht: 主要差距並非R600a是否允許使用，而是澳洲安全證據是否完整。出口商應將充注量、製冷劑符號、警示標籤、壓縮機和部件點火源評估、用戶/維修說明及測試報告條款與AS/NZS 60335.2.24逐項對應。製冷劑充注量、箱體容積、壓縮機、控制板、風扇、照明或化霜加熱器的任何變化都可能影響可燃性評估。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory through electrical safety/EESS obligations where applicable — AS/NZS 60335.2.24 is the relevant safety standard route for demonstrating flammable refrigerant safety; the legal obligation is the Australian electrical safety and EESS/RCM framework
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC/GB safety evidence applies before sale in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R600a is a practical refrigerant choice for Australian refrigerators, but flammability evidence must be built into the AS/NZS 60335.2.24 safety file and EESS/RCM compliance package. Chinese CCC evidence should be reviewed, not assumed equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R600a是澳大利亚电冰箱的可行制冷剂选择，但可燃性证据必须纳入AS/NZS 60335.2.24安全文件及EESS/RCM合规包。中国CCC证据应经过评审，不能默认等同。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R600a是澳洲電冰箱的可行製冷劑選擇，但可燃性證據必須納入AS/NZS 60335.2.24安全文件及EESS/RCM合規包。中國CCC證據應經過評審，不能默認等同。
